metadata.source: Cisco IOS/IOS-XE/NX-OS, Junos, and EOS configuration best practices

cisco_ebgp_peer.description: Basic eBGP peer configuration with MD5 authentication and prefix filtering
cisco_ebgp_peer.prefix_list_template:
ip prefix-list PFX-IN-{PEER_NAME} permit {EXPECTED_PREFIX}/{LEN}
ip prefix-list PFX-IN-{PEER_NAME} deny 0.0.0.0/0 le 32

bgp_communities.config:
ip bgp-community new-format
!
route-map SET-COMMUNITY permit 10
  set community {ASN}:{VALUE} additive
!
route-map FILTER-ON-COMMUNITY permit 10
  match community COMM-LIST-IN
  set local-preference 150
route-map FILTER-ON-COMMUNITY permit 20
!
ip community-list standard COMM-LIST-IN permit {ASN}:{VALUE}

cisco_ospf_area.description: OSPF area configuration with authentication and BFD
cisco_ospf_area.config:
router ospf {PROCESS_ID}
  router-id {ROUTER_ID}
  auto-cost reference-bandwidth 100000
  area 0 authentication message-digest
  passive-interface default
  no passive-interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
  no passive-interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
  !
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
  description Link to Distribution-1
  ip address {IP} {MASK}
  ip ospf {PROCESS_ID} area {AREA}
  ip ospf authentication message-digest
  ip ospf message-digest-key 1 md5 {PASSWORD}
  ip ospf network point-to-point
  ip ospf bfd
  bfd interval 300 min_rx 300 multiplier 3

ospf_summarization.description: ABR route summarization to reduce LSA count

hsrp_v2.description: HSRP Version 2 with preemption and interface tracking

vrrp_v3.description: VRRPv3 configuration (RFC 5798, supports IPv4 and IPv6)
vrrp_v3.track_config:
track 1 interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1 line-protocol
track 2 interface GigabitEthernet1/0/2 line-protocol
track 10 list boolean and
  object 1
  object 2

glbp.description: GLBP - load balances across multiple gateways (Cisco proprietary)

cisco_qos_policy.description: Enterprise QoS policy with voice, video, critical apps, and scavenger classes
cisco_qos_policy.class_maps:
class-map match-any VOICE
  match dscp ef
  match dscp cs5
class-map match-any VIDEO
  match dscp af41
  match dscp af42
  match dscp af43
class-map match-any CRITICAL-APPS
  match dscp af31
  match dscp af32
  match dscp af33
class-map match-any SCAVENGER
  match dscp cs1
  match protocol bittorrent
class-map match-any NETWORK-CONTROL
  match dscp cs6
  match dscp cs7
cisco_qos_policy.policy_map:
policy-map EGRESS-QOS
  class NETWORK-CONTROL
    bandwidth percent 5
  class VOICE
    priority percent 20
    set dscp ef
  class VIDEO
    bandwidth percent 15
    set dscp af41
    random-detect dscp-based
  class CRITICAL-APPS
    bandwidth percent 25
    set dscp af31
    random-detect dscp-based
  class SCAVENGER
    bandwidth percent 1
    set dscp cs1
  class class-default
    bandwidth percent 34
    set dscp default
    random-detect

ingress_marking.description: DSCP marking at network ingress (trust boundary)
ingress_marking.config:
class-map match-all VOICE-SIGNALING
  match protocol skinny
  match protocol sip
class-map match-all VOICE-MEDIA
  match protocol rtp audio
class-map match-all VIDEO-CONFERENCING
  match protocol rtp video
!
policy-map INGRESS-MARKING
  class VOICE-MEDIA
    set dscp ef
  class VIDEO-CONFERENCING
    set dscp af41
  class VOICE-SIGNALING
    set dscp cs3
  class class-default
    set dscp default

pci_dss_cde_acl.description: ACL implementing PCI-DSS CDE isolation - Requirement 1.3
pci_dss_cde_acl.config:
! ACL to permit only necessary traffic to CDE
ip access-list extended PERMIT-TO-CDE
  ! Permit authorized admin access
  permit tcp {ADMIN_SUBNET} {ADMIN_WILDCARD} {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} eq 22
  permit tcp {ADMIN_SUBNET} {ADMIN_WILDCARD} {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} eq 443
  ! Permit application servers to CDE database
  permit tcp {APP_SERVER_SUBNET} {APP_WILDCARD} {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} eq 1433
  permit tcp {APP_SERVER_SUBNET} {APP_WILDCARD} {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} eq 5432
  ! Permit NTP, SYSLOG from CDE to infrastructure
  permit udp {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} {NTP_SERVER} 0.0.0.0 eq 123
  permit udp {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} {SYSLOG_SERVER} 0.0.0.0 eq 514
  ! Explicit deny and log all other traffic
  deny ip any any log
!
ip access-list extended PERMIT-FROM-CDE
  ! Deny direct internet access from CDE (PCI Req 1.3.2)
  deny ip {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} any log
  ! Only permit traffic to authorized destinations
  permit tcp {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} {PAYMENT_GATEWAY} 0.0.0.0 eq 443
  permit tcp {CDE_SUBNET} {CDE_WILDCARD} {AUTHORIZED_MGMT} {MGMT_WILDCARD} eq 443
  deny ip any any log

internet_edge_acl.description: Internet edge inbound ACL - deny bogons and RFC1918
internet_edge_acl.config:
ip access-list extended INTERNET-INBOUND
  ! Deny bogon networks (RFC 5735)
  deny ip 0.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any log
  deny ip 127.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any log
  deny ip 10.0.0.0 0.255.255.255 any log
  deny ip 172.16.0.0 0.15.255.255 any log
  deny ip 192.168.0.0 0.0.255.255 any log
  deny ip 169.254.0.0 0.0.255.255 any log
  deny ip 192.0.2.0 0.0.0.255 any log
  deny ip 198.18.0.0 0.1.255.255 any log
  deny ip 198.51.100.0 0.0.0.255 any log
  deny ip 203.0.113.0 0.0.0.255 any log
  deny ip 224.0.0.0 31.255.255.255 any log
  ! Permit established TCP and ICMP
  permit tcp any any established
  permit icmp any any echo-reply
  permit icmp any any unreachable
  permit icmp any any time-exceeded
  ! Permit specific inbound services to DMZ
  permit tcp any {DMZ_WEB_SERVER} 0.0.0.0 eq 443
  permit tcp any {DMZ_WEB_SERVER} 0.0.0.0 eq 80
  permit tcp any {DMZ_MAIL_SERVER} 0.0.0.0 eq 25
  ! Deny everything else and log
  deny ip any any log

nxos_vxlan_evpn.spine_config:
feature bgp
feature pim
!
vlan 1-4094
!
route-map NEXT-HOP-UNCH permit 10
  set ip next-hop unchanged
!
router bgp {SPINE_AS}
  router-id {SPINE_LOOPBACK}
  address-family l2vpn evpn
    nexthop route-map NEXT-HOP-UNCH
    retain route-target all
  !
  neighbor {LEAF1_VTEP}
    remote-as {LEAF_AS}
    update-source loopback0
    address-family ipv4 unicast
      send-community extended
      route-reflector-client
    address-family l2vpn evpn
      send-community extended
      route-reflector-client
nxos_vxlan_evpn.leaf_config:
feature bgp
feature vn-segment-vlan-based
feature nv overlay
!
vlan {TENANT_VLAN}
  vn-segment {VNI}
!
interface nve1
  no shutdown
  host-reachability protocol bgp
  source-interface loopback1
  member vni {VNI}
    ingress-replication protocol bgp
!
evpn
  vni {VNI} l2
    rd auto
    route-target import auto
    route-target export auto
!
router bgp {LEAF_AS}
  router-id {LEAF_LOOPBACK}
  neighbor {SPINE1_IP}
    remote-as {SPINE_AS}
    update-source loopback0
    address-family ipv4 unicast
      send-community extended
    address-family l2vpn evpn
      send-community extended
